6:
WITH cust_czk AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
      AND Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
),
cons_2013 AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
           AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM cust_czk c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2013-%'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_per_seg AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
    FROM cons_2013
    GROUP BY Segment
),
selected AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, c.avg_consumption
    FROM cons_2013 c
    JOIN min_per_seg m ON c.Segment = m.Segment AND c.total_consumption = m.min_total
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM selected WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM selected WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM selected WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM selected WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM selected WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM selected WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM selected
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg_cons AS (
  SELECT
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
pct AS (
  SELECT
    Segment,
    CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012 END AS pct_increase
  FROM seg_cons
)
SELECT
  (SELECT Segment FROM pct ORDER BY pct_increase DESC LIMIT 1) AS biggest_increase_segment,
  (SELECT Segment FROM pct ORDER BY pct_increase ASC LIMIT 1) AS lowest_increase_segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
